action.reasoning: Observation: the clean privileged world-space heuristic runs end-to-end, but local 10-episode performance is much worse than the earlier GPS-only baseline (safe_follow_steps 4.2, avg distance 4.68). Analysis: this direction is not improving the dense proxies, and repeated heuristic rewrites have not moved full-eval nav_seek_success off 0. The best real eval so far remains the original simple GPS/compass heuristic from iteration 3 (safe_follow_steps 16.9, avg distance 4.38, nav_to_pos_success 0.62). With 19 iterations left but only ~8.4h, the highest-value next step is to restore that best-known controller exactly and submit eval, rather than continue exploring weaker variants. Decision: rewrite model/train/predict back to the earlier stronger GPS-only stateful heuristic, run a short local 10-episode self-test to confirm proxies recover, then submit eval next iteration if they do.
